memberdef.type: std::function< void(std::shared_ptr< VisualObject > obj, int index)>
memberdef.definition: using MR::PickPointManager::PickerPointCallBack = std::function<void( std::shared_ptr<VisualObject> obj, int index )>
memberdef.name: PickerPointCallBack

memberdef.type: std::function< bool(const std::shared_ptr< VisualObject > &obj, int index)>
memberdef.definition: using MR::PickPointManager::AllowCallBack = std::function<bool( const std::shared_ptr<VisualObject>& obj, int index )>
memberdef.name: AllowCallBack

briefdescription.para: whether the contour was closed before dragging of point #0, so we need to move the last point on end drag
point widget currently under mouse and highlighted
point widget currently dragged by mouse
data storage
all spheres created in createPickWidget_ to quickly differentiate them from other features
create an object and starts listening for mouse events
destroy this and remove the undo/redo actions referring this from the history.
return contour for specific object (creating new one if necessary)
return all contours, i.e. per object unorderd_map of ordered surface points [vector].
check whether the contour is closed for a particular object.
returns the total number of pick points (including extra point if the contour is closed) on given object
returns point widget by index from given object or nullptr if no such widget exists
returns index of given point widget on given object or -1 if this widget is not from given object
returns point widget currently dragged by mouse

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::shared_ptr< VisualObject > &obj, const PickedPoint &triPoint, bool startDragging=false)
memberdef.name: appendPoint

detaileddescription.para:
Add a point to the end of non closed contour connected with obj
startDragging
if true then new point widget is immediately made draggable by mouse, please be sure that mouse is over new point and is down

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::shared_ptr< VisualObject > &obj, int index, const PickedPoint &triPoint, bool startDragging=false)
memberdef.name: insertPoint

detaileddescription.para:
Inserts a point into contour connected with obj
index
point index before which to insert new point
startDragging
if true then new point widget is immediately made draggable by mouse, please be sure that mouse is over new point and is down

briefdescription.para: Remove point with pickedIndex index from contour connected with obj.

detaileddescription.para: if ( makeClosed ), and the contour is open add a special transparent point contour to the end of contour connected with given object. A coordinated of this special transparent point will be equal to the firs point in contour, which will means that contour is closed. if ( !makeClosed ), and the contour is closed remove last point of contour connected with given object.

briefdescription.para: returns the state of this
removes all points from all objects
removes all current points, then adds pick points on all objects as prescribed by given state

detaileddescription.para: sets the color of last and pre-last pick spheres for given object; the colors are taken from parameters

briefdescription.para: creates point widget for add to contour.
removes everything

detaileddescription.para: adds pick points on all objects as prescribed by given state, puts original state of this in s on return

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::shared_ptr< VisualObject > &obj, int index, const PickedPoint &point, bool startDragging)
memberdef.name: insertPointNoHistory_

parameterdescription.para: point index before which to insert new point, -1 here means insert after last one

briefdescription.para: if history writing is enabled, constructs history action and appends it to global store
if history writing is enabled, appends given history action to global store
setup new hovered point widget, and removes hovering from the previous one

detaileddescription.para: PickPointManager allows the user to pick/move/delete several ordered points on one or more visual objects; mouse events and public methods automatically add history actions for reverting (if enabled)
